definition: mean name or insult directed at a person/group (Coe et al. 2014)
unsupported derogatory claim about a target
profanity / crude language used aggressively
contemptuous shutdown of another's view
'we/us/our' tied to own team identity
'they/them' framing that demeans the rival
frames both sides as one larger group (CIIM target)
direct, non-hostile reply to a rival-team fan
example: answering a Celtics fan's question civilly

definition: acknowledges a valid point from the rival side
example: "ok that's fair, our bench is rough"

definition: asks the rival side something in good faith
joins a group dogpile on one user
sarcasm used to demean rather than joke
validates the emotion without taking the bait
declines to escalate an attack
shared joke that lowers tension
explicitly offers a shared topic/identity
adopts an agent's calmer tone or move
example: starts asking questions after an agent did

definition: engages an agent's task or question
suspects/accuses a participant of being AI
participates in the superordinate cooperative task
actively cooperates with a rival-team fan
